title: Session 88: Examples of L'Hospital's Rule
content:
« Previous | Next »
Overview In this session we see how L’Hospital’s rule is used and how it is related to quadratic approximation. Finally, we learn what other limits L’Hospital’s rule can be applied to.
Lecture Video and Notes Video Excerpts Clip 1: Limit of sin(5x)/sin(2x)
Clip 2: Repeating L’Hospital’s Rule
Clip 3: Comparison With Approximation
Clip 4: Extensions of L’Hospital’s Rule
Worked Example Limits at Inﬁnity for ex/x and x/ex
